title: GaiaTweaks
description: tweaks & bug fixes to 1.7.10 mods and vanilla
body:
GaiaTweaks is a highly configurable mod that adds quality of life features, reworks, tweaks, bug fixes, and mod interactions.



**_Vanilla Tweaks_**

- Decreases the delay to "tempt" an animal with their favorite food after you stopped holding it
- A sword parrying mechanic for projectiles. To do it, simply block your sword right before the projectile hits you
- Option to tweak the spawn weight/frequency of endermen
- Option to change how many blocks travelled in the nether are equivalent to in the overworld
- Backports 1.8+ item frame behaviour, allowing you to rotate items in 45 degrees (this is compatible with Botania's corporea blocks btw)
- Skeletons now visually pull their arrows before shooting
- Adds a button for accessing the Achievements menu to your inventory (also a keybind)
- Option to limit witches to spawning only in the Swampland biome, as opposed to every biome
- Food items can give configurable buffs when eaten (a few food items by default)
- Food items can be configured to have their eating speed halved (melon slices and spider eyes by default)
- Option to disable village generation
- Adds an optional stamina system that replaces the vanilla hunger system (deplenishes when running and slowly replenishes when walking/standing still; both health and stamina replenish when eating food)


**_Backported Mod Features_**

- Climb ladders faster by looking upwards, from Quark
- Underground biomes for sandy biomes, sandy biomes, lush biomes, etc (also Quark) [currently the only option for this feature is to disable it]
- Reversal ladder and slab recipes (also 8 stair output recipes and three block stair recipes that craft 4 stair blocks) [also Quark x2]
- Adds head slot to Baubles Expanded and allows the Goggles of Revealing from Thaumcraft to be worn in it (requires Baubles Expanded)
- Removes XP repair cost of unenchanted items and materials always repair tools by a third of their max durability, adapted from Lumberwizard's Anvil Patch


**_Mod Tweaks & Fixes_**

- **The Aether:**
- Configurable ore generation
- Makes the Aerbunny despawn outside the dimension
- Fixes the Aerbunny spawning a ton of black smoke particles when on the player's head
- Option to remove Valkyrie dialogue and the Valkyrie Queen's interaction UI
- Option to nerf Sentry Boots to have iron tier stats instead of diamond
- Moas will no longer drop eggs
- Golden Amber is made slightly harder to obtain, while also making non-Aether axes able to harvest it
- Option to reduce Ambrosium's stack size (useful especially if you're using the stamina system)
- Replaces Aether's accessory inventory with Baubles Expanded's (requires Baubles Expanded)
- Replaces The Aether's mimic mob with Primitive Mobs' (requires Primitive Mobs)
- **Thaumcraft:**
- Adds leaf-less taintwood log trees (inspired by the TC7 trailer)
- Nodes may "infuse" nearby stone blocks with one of it's aspects every three minutes, turning it into a crystal ore
- Thaumometers now ignore Item Frame entities (they don't have any aspects)
- Option to limit Greatwood trees to overworld
- Configurable biome blacklist for Greatwood tree generation (includes only Roofed Forests by default)
- Allows the Infernal Furnace to smelt iron ingots into Railcraft's steel ingots (Requires Railcraft, steel from other mods won't work)
- **Et Futurum Requiem:**
- Nether biomes' fungal roots now need to be broken with Shears to drop
- Fixes Thaumcraft's nether mobs spawning in the Crimson and Warped forests (Requires Thaumcraft)
- **Dimensional Doors:**
- Option to limit Gateway generation to the overworld
- **Battle Towers:**
- Replaces the vanilla mob spawner with a new custom spawner with less range that self destructs after 12 mobs are spawned
- Prevents towers from generating outside the overworld and removes the Nether/"Hell" tower variant
- Options to change the amount of items dropped by the golem
- **Primitive Mobs:**
- Limits the mod's monsters spawning to the overworld
- Option to remove the mod's achievement page
- **HammerZ:**
- Removes the hammers' right-click torch feature



This mod was originally made for the Blossom of Gaia modpack on Curseforge
